hero.desc: VECTRA fuses SAR satellite radar with epidemiological algorithms to deliver a 4-week early warning for vector-borne outbreak risk—before it reaches your workforce or your P&L.

problem.intro: Companies in tropical zones lose 10–20% of operational capacity during unmanaged outbreak seasons. This is not only a health crisis—it is a massive drain on capital through invisible downtime.

items.title: Operational stoppage cascades fast
items.body: A 20% workforce reduction during outbreak season doesn't just reduce output—it triggers cascading failures across shift scheduling, equipment maintenance, and supply chains simultaneously.

items.title: Fumigation decisions always come too late
items.body: By the time symptoms appear in the workforce, the outbreak is already embedded. Current reactive protocols lag 3–5 days behind real conditions. VECTRA delivers alerts 21–28 days early.

items.title: Standard weather data misses the real risk drivers
items.body: Rain forecasts don't capture soil moisture retention, biomass density, or standing water micro-pockets in dense jungle—the actual breeding environment for Aedes aegypti vectors.
items.statLbl: daily exposure in a single large mine

solution.intro: We fuse open satellite data, epidemiological APIs, and hydrological models into a single predictive engine—delivering a red/green risk signal 4 weeks before conditions become dangerous.

sources.name: Sentinel-1 / ICEYE SAR Radar
sources.desc: C-Band radar maps soil moisture and standing water through cloud cover—primary vector breeding indicators.

sources.name: InfoDengue API
sources.desc: Real-time epidemiological alert feed peer-validated in The Lancet. Covers dengue, chikungunya, and Zika across LatAm.

sources.name: D-MOSS Hydrology Engine
sources.desc: NASA-originated water availability model. Cross-references rainfall, runoff, and surface retention to predict breeding hotspots.

features.title: SAR Radar Fusion
features.desc: Cloud-penetrating tropical mapping every 6 days. Humidity, biomass, terrain.

features.title: Predictive Risk Engine
features.desc: ML correlating soil moisture with vector cycles. Trained on 8 years of LatAm data.

features.title: Red/Green Weekly Signal
features.desc: Dead-simple alert level per site, via dashboard, API, or email.

features.title: Automated ESG Reports
features.desc: Prove chemical reduction to regulators. "30% less fumigation, better outcomes."

features.title: ALCE-Compliant Data Sovereignty
features.desc: Native LatAm compliance—a barrier Silicon Valley competitors haven't cleared.

dashboard.desc: Real-time alerts. 4-week forecast. Live per-site risk status.

pricing.desc: Annual VECTRA cost = 0.5% of one day of downtime. Prevent one crisis, return your investment 200 times over.
pricing.roiDesc: ROI if VECTRA prevents a single day of operational crisis at a mid-sized mining site.

basic.name: Basic Alerts
basic.desc: Early warning dashboard for a single operational site.

pro.name: Pro — Alerts + ESG + API
pro.desc: Full suite for multi-site operations with compliance reporting.

footer.tagline: Operational Continuity Insurance via Satellite. Protecting people and capital in the Tropical Belt.
footer.mission: Built for operational directors who cannot afford surprises.

auth.note: Your data is protected under ALCE and LGPD compliance.

modal.desc: We'll configure VECTRA for your operational sites and deliver your first weekly risk report within 48 hours.
modal.note: No credit card required. Setup takes 10 minutes.
modal.successDesc: We'll reach out within 24 hours to configure your pilot. Your first weekly risk report will arrive within 48 hours.
